title: melanthera biflora
intro: Melanthera biflora, also known as the two-flowered melampodium, is a flowering plant species within the asteraceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating wounds, and acting as an antiseptic. Melanthera biflora is often prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
